mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, sys_id, sys_nm, upper_menu_id, upper_menu_nm, menu_nm, menu_level, menu_type, content_id, menu_link, menu_url, connect_menu_id, use_yn, connect_yn, sort_order, new_window_yn, folder_yn FROM TB_MENU_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, menu_id
SELECT menu_id, menu_nm, menu_level FROM TB_MENU_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND menu_level IN ('1', '2') ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT menu_id, menu_nm FROM TB_MENU_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND menu_type = 'PROGRAM' ORDER BY menu_nm
SELECT board_id, board_title FROM TB_BOARD_INFO WHERE board_use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY board_title
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MENU_INFO ( sys_id, sys_nm, upper_menu_id, upper_menu_nm, menu_nm, menu_level, menu_type, content_id, menu_link, menu_url, connect_menu_id, use_yn, connect_yn, connect_role, sort_order, new_window_yn, content_yn, right_click_yn, sub_right_click_yn, folder_yn, tab_yn, expand_yn ) VALUES ( #{sysId}, #{sysNm}, #{upperMenuId}, #{upperMenuNm}, #{menuNm}, #{menuLevel}, #{menuType}, #{contentId}, #{menuLink}, #{menuUrl}, #{connectMenuId}, 'Y', #{connectYn}, #{connectRole}, #{sortOrder}, #{newWindowYn}, #{contentYn}, #{rightClickYn}, #{subRightClickYn}, #{folderYn}, #{tabYn}, #{expandYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MENU_INFO SET upper_menu_id = #{upperMenuId}, upper_menu_nm = #{upperMenuNm}, menu_nm = #{menuNm}, menu_level = #{menuLevel}, menu_type = #{menuType}, content_id = #{contentId}, menu_link = #{menuLink}, menu_url = #{menuUrl}, connect_menu_id = #{connectMenuId}, connect_yn = #{connectYn}, connect_role = #{connectRole}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, new_window_yn = #{newWindowYn}, folder_yn = #{folderYn} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
UPDATE TB_MENU_INFO SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
